steps.title: Identify what scientists lack
steps.content: The final sentence shows “forest researchers regularly dispute one another's classifications” — scientists disagree. The blank must name something whose absence explains this disagreement.

steps.title: Find the word that expresses the missing element
steps.content:
”Consensus” means agreement — exactly what's missing when scientists disagree.

Where scientists lack consensus about classifications, different estimates naturally follow.

Interest, deliberation, and vigilance don't name something whose absence explains disagreement.

That matches choice D — D is correct.
